sections: Canonical artifacts, renderer-derived views, and Projections
HCM-0.6 exact shipped kind and root-profile data
HCM-2.1 Project Context canonical-YAML pilot proof gate
First-party intake, renderers, and Projection posture
complete selected dependency and transition record

repo_truth: Fresh read-only Review 1 of the exact seven-file HCM-2.1 planning subject. HCM-1.4 is completed dependency evidence. No HCM-2.1 packet existed at entry. Live source still uses a rich 0.1.0 ProjectContextStructuredInput and timestamped Markdown renderer for authoring, selected structural YAML inspection for setup/doctor, and fixed Markdown Project Context in flow. The admitted HCM-1.2 canonical schema is the smaller closed handbook.artifact.project-context/1.0 record. Independently determine whether the packet resolves that live mismatch, owner boundaries, direct cutover, temporary flow bridge, proof wall, and classification ceiling without an implementation-time choice or forbidden widening; inherit no approval.
allowed_scope: Remain read-only and replay the sorted seven-entry manifest and aggregate fingerprint before review.
Review every byte of 00, 04, 06, HCM-2.1 SPEC, plan, unchecked todo, and planning proof wall.
Read unchanged 01, 02, 03, 05, 07, 08, HCM-0.6 decision, selected HCM-1.4 record, exact definition assets, and live engine/compiler/flow/CLI/template/test sources only as needed.
Run bounded read-only Markdown, link, Git, handoff/schema, source/API feasibility, proof, cross-platform, compatibility, determinism, and security checks.
Return findings first with exact file/line evidence through the built-in channel.
non_goals: No edits, staging, commits, new dispatches, global handoffs, ledger writes, or user task hops.
No Rust, Cargo, definition, template, fixture, test, runtime/product, pipeline, HCM-2.2+, SDK, Tauri, Substrate, contract, dock, or publication implementation.

Do not invent schema fields, input mappings, renderer definitions, semantic validators, lifecycle, intake, setup materialization, condition evidence, Resolution, Projection, compatibility, platform proof, or pipeline migration.
Do not treat the parent draft, baseline tests, selected predecessor record, or phase-map candidate wording as approval of an internally inconsistent packet.
tasks: Invoke required skills in order, remain read-only, replay the exact seven-entry manifest/aggregate, and return BLOCKED if any byte differs.
Review findings first in Critical, Required, Optional, Nit order with severity, exact file/line, violated contract/gate, concrete failure, smallest valid remediation, and missing/invalidated proof.
Verify Project Context is a sufficiently authorized exact pilot and the packet does not silently use candidate wording to amend HCM-0.6 product authority.

Verify the frozen HCM-1.2 schema, current rich author input, current renderer, selected setup/doctor closure, flow/fixed-family architecture, package definitions, templates, and tests support every prescribed future change without an unlisted file, schema edit, generic framework, pipeline change, or impossible API.

Verify canonical parse/serialize/render/fingerprint bytes, duplicate/syntax/path/race/security rules, overwrite policy, setup no-write contract, doctor version/nullability, flow bridge, budget/freshness/log effects, and legacy-irrelevance rules are total and non-contradictory.

Verify the plan is dependency-ordered and test-first, todo remains entirely unchecked, allowed scope is exact, stop conditions are honest, and all mandatory implementation proof is runnable without forbidden scope.

Verify cross-document consistency across 00/04/06 and the packet, bridge admission/deletion, PG-YAML/PG-ARTIFACT/PG-KIND classification ceiling, docs-only current subject, fresh-review loop, and two-commit closeout.
Return CLEAN only if there is no valid Critical or Required finding; otherwise return CHANGES_REQUIRED or BLOCKED. Make no edits and use bounded checks rather than indefinite waits.
stop_conditions: Return BLOCKED if the manifest/aggregate, required authority, live source, or mandatory read-only verification cannot be reproduced.

Return CHANGES_REQUIRED rather than inventing schema/path authority, a rich-input mapping, persistent-view behavior, renderer identity, setup materialization, pipeline migration, compatibility, platform proof, content semantics, or later-slice behavior.
Return to the parent if remediation would require implementation, broader product authority, HCM-2.2+, or global handoff/ledger mutation.
